Lakan Harbor Holdings, Inc. (LHHI), Unit 11F, Coral North Hub, Barangay Malinis, San Palayo City, Luntian Province 4510; DPO: Atty. Celina R. Ocampo; contact dpo@lakanharbor.ph / +63-28-777-0044 (fictional).
We process personal data as defined under the PH Data Privacy Act (information from which identity is apparent or can be directly ascertained, or when combined with other data), for HR, payroll, banking settlement, tax support, and capital-markets compliance.
Examples include name, work e‑mail, bank payout details (Acct No: 23‑xx‑**98), compensation bands, internal tax reference (ITRF‑4X7‑22Z), and device logs; employee code E m p ‑ 0 7 3 1 ‑ 9 X; we do not collect government-issued IDs in this workflow.
Data subject rights (access/correct/erase/port/complain) may be exercised by writing Mr. Isagani R. Velasco, Privacy Officer, via privacydesk@lakanharbor.ph; we target acknowledgment within 5 working days and completion within 15, subject to lawful exemptions.
Cross-border transfers (e.g., to LHHI Shared Services Sdn. in Eastmark for payroll engines and to BayanCloud OPC for secure archival) occur under National Privacy Directorate–recognized clauses and vendor DPAs; NPD Ref: N P D / P H / 2 0 2 6 ‑ 0 0 9.
Retention: payroll and benefits records 5 years from separation; treasury KYC files 7 years from account close; insider-list entries 7 years from last update; secure deletion certificates logged in VaultTrack.
Material non‑public information (MNPI) means information a reasonable investor would deem important in deciding to trade LHHI securities and that is not yet available on the EDGE portal or via our current reports; examples include draft Q2 results, unannounced follow‑on offering on the Bayan Stock Exchange (BSE), or a signed but unannounced credit line with Isla Rural Bank.
We make immediate disclosure through the BSE EDGE portal and a Current Report (Form 17‑R) within the prescribed period on the same trading day where required by PSC/BSE rules; after such posting, the information is public for trading/comms purposes.
Blackout: directors, officers, and covered staff may not trade LHHI shares from 14 calendar days before quarter‑end until two trading days after our EDGE posting of results; ad‑hoc blackout windows apply for significant transactions as determined by the Compliance Office.
Selective disclosure is prohibited: no sharing of MNPI with analysts, lenders, or counterparties unless wall‑crossed with NDA approval from the Corporate Secretary (Ms. Pilar J. Tiamzon) and recorded on the insider list with time‑stamped access.
Public-status precision: the 01 Mar 2026 EDGE filing on “Project Balangay MOU” (h t t p s : / / e d g e . b s e . p h / f i l i n g / 1 7 R ? c = L H H I & d = 2 0 2 6 0 3 0 1) is already public; referencing that filing or its press release summary is not MNPI, but draft term sheets not in that filing remain MNPI.
Negative/benign note for precision: no material adverse change clause is triggered in the Subscription Term Sheet (draft v3); generic marketing copy for HarborPay Lite and the 2024‑Q4 investor day deck are public‑source and stale; sprint notes (“move baybayin app launch to q4; update icons”) are operational and not issuer‑level material absent quantitative thresholds.
Issuer‑relative materiality: operational updates at LHHI’s small logistics subsidiary (≤3% revenue) generally do not constitute MNPI unless the impact crosses internally set significance levels or alters our earnings guidance trajectory.
Banking and tax processing: payroll is remitted via Isla Rural Bank (Clearing ID: I R B ‑ 0 4 2) and SwiftBridge gateway; payment files use masked identifiers; approval logs capture preparer/approver IDs and timestamps for audit under the Finance SOP.
Security controls: role‑based access, encryption at rest/in transit, and immutable audit trails in “J O B S ‑ 2 0 2 6 ‑ P R”; suspected incidents are reported within 72 hours to NPD and affected users, unless an exemption applies.
